result.stdout:
vgy.me CLI v0.1.0
  Unofficial CLI for vgy.me

Usage
  vgy.me [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  configure         Configure this tool.
  delete            Delete an image you previously uploaded.
  upload            Upload an image to vgy.me.

You can run `vgy.me [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
vgy.me CLI v0.1.0
  Unofficial CLI for vgy.me

Usage
  vgy.me [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  configure         Configure this tool.
  delete            Delete an image you previously uploaded.
  upload            Upload an image to vgy.me.

You can run `vgy.me [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Configure this tool.

Usage
  vgy.me configure [command] <userkey> [options]

Parameters
* userkey           API key/userkey. To generate one go to https://vgy.me/account/details. 

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

Commands
  reset             Delete the .vgy.me.json file in your home folder.

You can run `vgy.me configure [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Delete an image you previously uploaded.

Usage
  vgy.me delete <DeleteUrl> [options]

Parameters
* DeleteUrl         The URL of the image to delete, or "all" to delete all images that have been uploaded that aren't albums. 

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Delete an image you previously uploaded.

Usage
  vgy.me delete <DeleteUrl> [options]

Parameters
* DeleteUrl         The URL of the image to delete, or "all" to delete all images that have been uploaded that aren't albums. 

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Upload an image to vgy.me.

Usage
  vgy.me upload <files...> [options]

Parameters
* files             Image file(s) to upload. 

Options
  -t|--title        A title that vgy.me displays on the viewer page. 
  -d|--description  A description that vgy.me displays on the viewer page. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Upload an image to vgy.me.

Usage
  vgy.me upload <files...> [options]

Parameters
* files             Image file(s) to upload. 

Options
  -t|--title        A title that vgy.me displays on the viewer page. 
  -d|--description  A description that vgy.me displays on the viewer page. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
